seo.title: Browser Extension Guide - Install AiToEarn Plugin
seo.description: Step-by-step guide to install and use the AiToEarn browser extension for automated social media content publishing and management.
seo.keywords: browser extension, plugin guide, installation guide, Chrome extension, social media automation, AiToEarn

title: Browser Plugin Guide
introduction: This guide will walk you through how to install and use the AiToEarn browser plugin, enabling you to manage your social media accounts and publish content more conveniently.

recommendedBrowser.title: Recommended Browsers
recommendedBrowser.content: Edge and Google Chrome. The tutorial below uses Google Chrome for all examples.

sections.manualInstallDesc: For Latest GitHub Channel Download and Latest China Download

step1.title: Step 1: Open Plugin Management Dialog
step1.content: On the AiToEarn platform page, click the plugin icon in the upper right corner to open the browser plugin management dialog.
step1.caption: Click the Extension button in the upper right corner

step2.title: Step 2: Download the Plugin
step2.content: Select the download method in the dialog and click to download the plugin.
step2.caption: Choose a download channel in the plugin dialog

chrome.title: Chrome Web Store:
chrome.content: We recommend installing from the Chrome Web Store, but store reviews can take time. When new features are released early, the Chrome Web Store version may still be an older build. If you do not need the latest features immediately, you can wait for the review to finish. Chrome Web Store also updates plugins automatically. If you need the latest plugin package, use Latest China Download or Latest GitHub Channel Download.

github.title: Latest GitHub Channel Download:
github.content: This channel provides the newest plugin package. New browser-plugin updates are published here first, then submitted to the Chrome Web Store, which usually takes another 4-5 days for review.

china.title: Latest China Download:
china.content: Users in mainland China who cannot use the Chrome Web Store can download the latest plugin package from this channel.

updateNote.prefix: Note: users who install from Latest China Download or Latest GitHub Channel Download will still receive Chrome Web Store auto-updates after review. If you need the update sooner, please see

step2.noteItem1: We recommend installing the extension from the Chrome Web Store.
step2.noteItem2: If you cannot access the Chrome Web Store in China, download the extension from Latest China Download (zip). When new features are released, Chrome Web Store review can take some time, so this channel may occasionally be newer than the Chrome Web Store version.

step3.title: Step 3: Check Installation Status
step3.content: After installation, click the browser's extensions button to check if the installation was successful.
step3.caption: Find AiToEarn plugin in browser extension bar

step4.title: Step 4: Enter Plugin Details Page
step4.content: If the installation is successful, click on the plugin to enter the plugin details page.

step5.title: Step 5: Authorize the Plugin
step5.notLoggedInContent: If you are not logged in on the AiToEarn homepage, click "Go to Home" to go to the AiToEarn homepage and log in.
step5.notLoggedInCaption: Click 'Go to Home' to log in first
step5.loggedInContent: If you are already logged in on the AiToEarn homepage, click "Authorize Now" to authorize.
step5.loggedInCaption: Click 'Authorize Now' to authorize the plugin

step6.title: Step 6: Confirm Plugin is Ready
step6.content: Permission has been granted successfully. Next, open the AiToEarn platform, refresh the page, and you will see the plugin is ready. Click on it to view details.
step6.caption2: Return to AiToEarn platform to check plugin status

step7.title: Step 7: View Account Information
step7.content: If you have logged into the platforms supported by the plugin, you will see that the plugin has obtained the corresponding accounts.
step7.loginContent: Click the "Extension" button to view account login status. If it shows not logged in, please log in to the corresponding social media platform first.
step7.caption: Check Xiaohongshu account login status

step7b.title: Login Xiaohongshu Account
step7b.content: Click "Login Now" to jump to the Xiaohongshu page to log in. After logging in, you also need to log in to the Creator Center.
step7b.caption1: Quickly enter Creator Center from the upper right corner
step7b.caption2: After logging in, refresh the page to see the account is authorized
step7b.importantNoteContent: Xiaohongshu homepage and Creator Center need to be logged in separately. The plugin function can only be used normally after both are logged in.

step8.title: Step 8: Sync Accounts
step8.content: You can sync accounts to account management here. Click the [Sync] button, and the account will be synced to our database.
step8.caption: Click 'Sync' button to sync account

step9.title: View Sync Results
step9.content: Return to the AiToEarn homepage and click "My Channels" to enter the account management page.
step9.caption1: Click 'My Channels' to enter account management
step9.caption2: You can see the Xiaohongshu account has been successfully synced

complete.title: Complete
complete.content: Now you can use the AiToEarn platform normally!

manualInstall.tipPrefix: If you have already installed the plugin from the Chrome Web Store, you can skip this section and go directly to the

step1.title: Enter Extensions Management Page
step1.content: Click the three-dot menu in the upper right corner of the browser, and click to enter "Manage Extensions" page.

step2.title: Enable Developer Mode
step2.content: In the upper right corner of the extensions page, enable "Developer mode".

step3.title: Locate the Downloaded Package
step3.content: Open your browser's download folder and find the downloaded .crx plugin package.

step4.title: Drag the Package into Extensions
step4.content: Drag the .crx plugin package into the browser extensions area.

step5.title: Confirm Extension Installation
step5.content: Click "Add extension" in the confirmation dialog to install the plugin.

step6.title: Turn Off Developer Mode
step6.content: After the installation is complete, you can turn off Developer mode.

manualInstall.tipContent: If you installed the extension from the Chrome Web Store, you can skip this section and go directly to Authorize the extension.

q1.question: Why does the plugin still show not logged in after I logged into Xiaohongshu?
q1.answer: You may not have logged into the Xiaohongshu Creator Center. On the Xiaohongshu homepage, click the button in the upper right corner to quickly log into the Xiaohongshu Creator Center.
